items.title: Inside Claude Code Auto Mode: Anthropic’s Autonomous Coding System with Human Approval Gates
items.summaryShort: Inside Claude Code Auto Mode: Anthropic’s Autonomous Coding System with Human Approval Gates. Anthropic has introduced auto mode in Claude Code, enabling multi-step software development workflows with reduced manual intervention.

items.title: Presentation: How Netflix Shapes our Fleet for Efficiency and Reliability
items.summaryShort: Presentation: How Netflix Shapes our Fleet for Efficiency and Reliability. The speakers explain the inherent tension between service efficiency and reliability at Netflix's global scale.

items.title: GitHub Enhances CodeQL with Declarative Security Modeling for Faster, More Flexible Analysis
items.summaryShort: GitHub Enhances CodeQL with Declarative Security Modeling for Faster, More Flexible Analysis. GitHub has introduced a significant update to its CodeQL engine, enabling developers to define custom sanitizers and validators directly through "

items.title: Mistral Adds Remote Agents and Work Mode to Le Chat
items.summaryShort: Mistral Adds Remote Agents and Work Mode to Le Chat. Mistral has released Mistral Medium 3.5, a 128-billion parameter model designed to handle instruction following, reasoning, and coding within a single system, and introduced new cloud-bas

items.title: Article: Three Pillars of Platform Engineering: a Virtuous Cycle
items.summaryShort: Article: Three Pillars of Platform Engineering: a Virtuous Cycle. Platform engineering succeeds when reliability and ergonomics reinforce each other rather than compete.

items.title: Nuro receives driverless testing permit ahead of Uber robotaxi service launch
items.summaryShort: Nuro receives driverless testing permit ahead of Uber robotaxi service launch. The Silicon Valley AV startup has not started driverless testing yet.

items.title: SAP bets $1.16B on 18-month-old German AI lab and says yes to NemoClaw
items.summaryShort: SAP bets $1.16B on 18-month-old German AI lab and says yes to NemoClaw. SAP plans to buy German AI startup Prior Labs and invest heavily in it.

items.title: Bumble's paying users are slipping as it bets on an overhaul later this year
items.summaryShort: Bumble's paying users are slipping as it bets on an overhaul later this year. The company is making a big bet that the swiping model is outdated and most matches never turn into actual dates.
